title: Self-Attention Mechanics
content:
# Self-Attention Mechanics

## 1. Mathematical Equation
$$\text{Attention}(\mathbf{Q}, \mathbf{K}, \mathbf{V}) = \text{softmax}\left( \frac{\mathbf{Q}\mathbf{K}^{\top}}{\sqrt{d_k}} \right)\mathbf{V}$$

## 2. Scaling Derivation
*   If $q_i, k_i \sim \mathcal{N}(0, 1)$, then $\text{Var}(\mathbf{q} \cdot \mathbf{k}) = d_k$.
*   Dividing by $\sqrt{d_k}$ scales the variance back to $1.0$, preventing softmax saturation.
